raw_consumer_statement:
I disputed a {$330.00} charge from XXXX XXXX XXXX for merchant misrepresentation and deceptive sales tactics. AmEx denied the dispute without properly evaluating the evidence and removed previously uploaded documentation. When I contacted the dispute department, they refused to reopen the case and stated they can not override the merchants refund policy, which is not a valid basis under federal law for denying a chargeback. 

The merchant used false pricing ( claiming the products retailed for {$700.00} ), fabricated discounts, pressured for immediate payment before consent, and made scientifically impossible claims of permanent wrinkle removal. I have receipts, product photographs, and reviews showing this is a pattern of deception. AmEx did not review these materials before closing the case. 

I am requesting the CFPB instruct American Express to reopen the dispute under merchant misrepresentation, allow submission of evidence, and conduct a proper review.
